global.description: The ad features a warm orange background with food images and promotional text.
global.main_message: Promoting quick meal options at an affordable price.

elements.label: Solid orange background
elements.description: A vibrant solid orange background fills the entire canvas, providing a warm and inviting atmosphere.

elements.label: Three food images
elements.description: Three rectangular images of food items are displayed in a row, each with a slight shadow for depth.

elements.label: Three food images
elements.description: Another view of the three rectangular images of food items, maintaining the same arrangement and shadow effect.

elements.label: Three food images
elements.description: The third perspective of the three rectangular images of food items, consistent in style and layout.

elements.label: Dinner in minutes
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Dinner in minutes' is centrally positioned, conveying a quick meal option.
elements.text_content: Dinner in minutes Fresh favorites nearby

elements.label: QuickFork SALE
elements.description: A prominent yellow text label reading 'QuickFork SALE' is placed at the top, drawing immediate attention.

elements.label: Book now button
elements.description: A bright button with the text 'Book now' in white, inviting users to take action, located at the bottom.

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: A small yellow price tag displaying '€9.99' is positioned near the bottom, indicating the cost of the meal.
